base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_mummy_man_walk — a character from 1986 castlevania. Mummy — 2-frame arms-outstretched shamble. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mummy — 2-frame arms-outstretched shamble; fought as a pair (2 Mummy Men) in Level 3 Crumbling Tower. Throws bandage-strips as projectiles
